summary: Fresh first-run e2e test of Aiel Design & Printing Studio (backend + frontend). Backend: 8/8 pytest tests passing. Frontend: 10/10 critical flows passing after retry (initial 2 failures were test-script timing issues caused by the cart drawer auto-opening after add-to-cart — not actual bugs).

minor.issue: List endpoint has no response_model; pydantic validation not enforced on outgoing payload (currently fine since data is static).
Not in the required test list, but exists and works — converts created_at string back to datetime correctly.

issues: After Add to Cart the drawer auto-opens which is good UX, but the underlying detail page becomes non-interactive until drawer is closed. Consider letting users keep shopping (auto-close after 1.5s or show a toast only).

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: GET /api/products and GET /api/gallery return raw dicts/lists without a response_model. Add Pydantic Product/GalleryItem models for stronger contract.
server.py: created_at stored as ISO string in Mongo then converted back to datetime in GET /orders. Consider storing as a real BSON date for proper sorting/indexing.

CartDrawer.jsx: submitOrder swallows POST /api/orders errors with console.warn — user is not informed if the order persist fails (they still get WhatsApp link, which is the desired UX, but a toast warning would help debugging).
Frontend uses axios baseURL via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL correctly across all pages — no hardcoded URLs found.
data-testid coverage is excellent — all interactive elements (nav, filters, cart, product variants, contact form) have testids.
seed_data_creation: Test created 2 orders + 1 contact in MongoDB with TEST_ prefixed customer names — safe to retain or purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Frontend cart drawer auto-opens on add-to-cart; when writing Playwright tests, either close the drawer before clicking other elements on the underlying page, or operate within the drawer. WhatsApp window.open is patched in tests by injecting init script that pushes URLs to window.__opened. All wa.me links must contain 919150234277.
verified_flows: Home page loads with hero, nameboard banner image, 4 product cards, services marquee, value props, footer
Nav links: Home/Shop/Catalogue/Gallery/Contact all work via data-testid nav-link-*
Shop page lists 4 products, filter Best Seller narrows to 1
Product detail: color/size/print-area/qty/notes selection, Add to Cart updates badge & opens drawer, Order on WhatsApp opens correct wa.me URL with product details
Cart drawer: qty inc/dec, remove item, clear cart, customer name/phone fields, Checkout via WhatsApp triggers POST /api/orders (verified body) AND opens wa.me URL with order summary
Gallery: 12 items loaded, category filter (Mugs) narrows correctly, lightbox open/close
Catalogue page renders with Print/PDF button
Contact form submits to /api/contact and shows success toast
Floating WhatsApp FAB visible on all pages with href https://wa.me/919150234277
rca of the issue: N/A — no production bugs. Initial 2 Playwright failures were due to drawer-open-after-add-to-cart blocking subsequent clicks on the underlying page; resolved by closing drawer before further interaction in retry script.
